title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH RESOURCE NETWORK - 211info
text: FAITH HOPE AND CHARITY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH RESOURCE NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources, and referrals to people impacted by substance-use disorder, mental illness, and/or homelessness. 460 SW Madison Avenue Suite 1 Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 740-5807 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 740-5807 Lincoln County support (541) 961-3268 Will Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English and Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING NAVIGATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTH OPPORTUNITY PROSPERITY AND EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAITH HOPE AND CHARITY
